_meta.description: Canonical nav layout applied AFTER all manifest.d fragments merge (ADR-037/ADR-044, buildManifest.js). relocations: sourceId -> targetGroupId; a missing/synthetic target id (e.g. '__toplevel__') lifts the entry to the top level, and an emptied group shell is dropped. removals: leaf menu-entry ids retired from nav (their PAGES stay routable). settingsSection: top-level config/admin leaf ids lifted into the NC settings foldout (gear icon, outside the scrollable nav). nav-restructure-dashboards IA (amends ADR-009, supersedes ADR-044): the app opens on the top-level Dashboard; the Insight group is dissolved (Dashboard + Compliance promoted to top level); Learning + People are navigable domain dashboards whose leaves render as collapsible sub-children (so #removals no longer hides them); Features & roadmap sits in the footer beside Documentation; School-year rollover lives in the settings foldout.

_settingsSectionNote: XapiStatementsMenu carries section:'settings' in the base manifest; Rollover (School-year rollover) is admin-gated structural config lifted here so the foldout is the single authoritative home for settings-adjacent leaves. FeaturesRoadmapMenu was removed by nav-restructure-dashboards (Phase A) — it renders in the footer beside Documentation. AssistantMenu was removed entirely by relocate-dataexchange-remove-assistant (Phase B) — the inherited AI chat is gone. DataExchange was also removed from the in-app foldout by Phase B: the data-exchange BACKEND + OSO are kept intact and its management UI now lives in the Nextcloud Admin Settings page (AdminRoot.vue → DataExchangeSettingsSection), which deep-links into the still-routable data-exchange pages.
